top_signals.title: A Record-Breaking Patch Tuesday for June 2026
top_signals.summary: Microsoft today released software updates to plug nearly 200 security holes across its Windows operating systems and supported software, a record number of fixes for the company's monthly Patch Tuesday cycle. Nearly three dozen of those bugs earned Microsoft's most dire "critical" rating, and exploit code for at least three of the weaknesses is now publicly available.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Cook, The Opportunities and Risks AI Presents for the Economy and Financial System
top_signals.summary: Speech At the Stanford Institute for Economic Policy Research, Stanford University, Stanford, California
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Agencies remove additional references to reputation risk
top_signals.summary: Agencies remove additional references to reputation risk

top_signals.title: Barr, Measuring Financial Health
top_signals.summary: Speech At EMERGE Financial Health 2026 Scaling Progress, Shaping the Future, Atlanta, Georgia
